contentBlocks.original:
अन्नपूर्णे सदापूर्णे
शङ्करप्राणवल्लभे
ज्ञान वैराग्य सिद्ध्यर्थं
भिक्षां देहि च पार्वति
माता च पार्वती देवी
पिता देवो महेश्वरः
बान्धवाः शिवभक्ताश्च
स्वदेशो भुवनत्रयम्
contentBlocks.transliteration:
annapūrṇe sadāpūrṇe
śaṅkaraprāṇavallabhe
jñāna vairāgya siddhyarthaṃ
bhikṣāṃ dehi ca pārvati
mātā ca pārvatī devī
pitā devo maheśvaraḥ
bāndhavāḥ śivabhaktāśca
svadeśo bhuvanatrayam
contentBlocks.translation:
O Annapūrṇa, who is ever full, beloved of Lord Śankara, grant me alms, O Pārvatī, for the attainment of knowledge and detachment.

My mother is Goddess Pārvatī, father is Lord Maheśvara (Shiva). My relatives are the devotees of Shiva, and my homeland is the three worlds (heaven, earth, and the netherworld).
contentBlocks.meanings: अन्नपूर्णे (annapūrṇe) – O Annapūrṇa (anna:food | pūrṇe:full); सदापूर्णे (sadāpūrṇe) – ever full (sadā:always | pūrṇe:full); शङ्करप्राणवल्लभे (śaṅkaraprāṇavallabhe) – beloved of Śankara (śaṅkara:Śankara | prāṇa:life | vallabhe:beloved); ज्ञान (jñāna) – knowledge; वैराग्य (vairāgya) – detachment; सिद्ध्यर्थं (siddhyarthaṃ) – for attainment (siddhi:attainment | arthaṃ:for); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; च (ca) – and; पार्वति (pārvati) – O Pārvatī; माता (mātā) – mother; च (ca) – and; पार्वती (pārvatī) – Pārvatī; देवी (devī) – goddess; पिता (pitā) – father; देवो (devo) – god; महेश्वरः (maheśvaraḥ) – Maheśvara; बान्धवाः (bāndhavāḥ) – relatives; शिवभक्ताश्च (śivabhaktāśca) – devotees of Shiva and (śiva:Shiva | bhaktāḥ:devotees | ca:and); स्वदेशो (svadeśo) – homeland; भुवनत्रयम् (bhuvanatrayam) – three worlds (bhuvana:world | trayam:three);
